items.name: Jimil Pandit
items.quote: Harsh demonstrated exceptional analytical ability and strategic thinking. He was highly proactive, collaborative, and contributed significantly to our operational workflow optimization projects.

items.name: Aditya Dave
items.quote: Harsh's work on our automated vending machine R&D was outstanding. He has a unique combination of embedded systems technical skill and business execution mindset that makes him an asset to any team.
